name: deepbiology
description: Codex plugin for DeepBiology Lab that gives agents workflows for gene regulation analysis, enhancer importance scanning, mutation impact evaluation, and enhancer redesign — plus gene alias resolution and job tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Submit genomics research workflows to DeepBiology Lab from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides seven Codex skills for DeepBiology Lab: gene alias resolution, transcription gradient analysis (Q1), enhancer mutation importance scan (Q2), mutation impact analysis (Q3), AI-driven enhancer redesign (Q4), job status checking, and result retrieval. Each skill uses a shared Python wrapper to submit jobs, poll for completion, and format results so agents can run DeepBiology workflows end to end.
defaultPrompt: Analyze the transcription regulation of CCND1 in myeloid cell lines.
Scan for important enhancer positions near the MYC gene.
What's the impact of this mutation on the CD34 enhancer region?
Redesign the enhancer around the BCL2 gene to optimize expression.
